---
title: "histogram_match_fit"
generated: true
description: "Fit the reference standard-scale landmarks (the `apply` target)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.bias`](../nitrix-bias.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.bias._histogram_match`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:histogram_match_fit -->
```python
histogram_match_fit(reference: Float[Array, '*spatial'], *, reference_weight: Optional[Float[Array, '*spatial']] = None, n_match_points: int = 7, n_histogram_levels: int = 1024, threshold_at_mean: bool = True) -> Float[Array, ' landmarks']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:histogram_match_fit -->
Fit the reference standard-scale landmarks (the `apply` target).

The *fit* half of the Nyul-Udupa "fit a standard scale once, apply to
many subjects" workflow: derive the reference image's landmark
intensities -- the outer extrema, the optional mean landmark, and the
`n_match_points` interior quantile landmarks -- so the same standard
scale can be applied to many sources via [`histogram_match_apply`](../nitrix-bias/histogram_match_apply.qmd)
without re-deriving them (and without carrying the reference volume).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:histogram_match_fit -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `reference` | `Float` | `*spatial` | — | Image whose intensity distribution defines the target CDF. |
| `reference_weight` | `Optional[Float[Array, '*spatial']]` | — | `None` | Optional mask / confidence (see [`histogram_match`](../nitrix-bias/histogram_match.qmd)). Passing a weight overrides the ITK-style `threshold_at_mean` policy. |
| `n_match_points` | `int` | — | `7` | As [`histogram_match`](../nitrix-bias/histogram_match.qmd). The **same** values must be passed to [`histogram_match_apply`](../nitrix-bias/histogram_match_apply.qmd), or the source and reference landmark vectors disagree in length (`apply` validates this). |
| `n_histogram_levels` | `int` | — | `1024` | As [`histogram_match`](../nitrix-bias/histogram_match.qmd). The **same** values must be passed to [`histogram_match_apply`](../nitrix-bias/histogram_match_apply.qmd), or the source and reference landmark vectors disagree in length (`apply` validates this). |
| `threshold_at_mean` | `bool` | — | `True` | As [`histogram_match`](../nitrix-bias/histogram_match.qmd). The **same** values must be passed to [`histogram_match_apply`](../nitrix-bias/histogram_match_apply.qmd), or the source and reference landmark vectors disagree in length (`apply` validates this). |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `landmarks`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen sections:histogram_match_fit -->
::: {.callout-note}
Computed in `result_type(reference.dtype, float32)` (the fp32 floor
of the scientific core); `apply` upcasts to its own working dtype.
Not differentiable through the histogram binning (see
[`histogram_match`](../nitrix-bias/histogram_match.qmd)).
:::
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:histogram_match_fit -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
| `landmarks` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
